name: webde-drafts
description: Create draft emails in a WEB.DE mailbox from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create WEB.DE email drafts from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a draft creation tool for WEB.DE accounts using IMAP draft sync.
defaultPrompt: Create a WEB.DE draft to my client about next week's review.
Draft a follow-up email in my WEB.DE account.
Save this message as a WEB.DE draft instead of sending it.
